title: Inttelligent
subTitle: A software engineer comes to the rescue of his employer when his competitors use corrupt means to destroy their business and reputation.

title: Ghudchadi
subTitle: Chirag and Devika fall in love with each other and plan to get married. However, trouble ensues when they realise Chirag's father and Devika's mother were former lovers.

title: Jaane Bhi Do Yaaro
subTitle: Two photographers experience the deadly side of Bombay real estate when they stumble upon a murder.

title: Vikram Hitlist
subTitle: The police launch a black-ops operation against a mysterious masked vigilante and his team, whose mission is to free society from a dangerous drug epidemic.

title: Jawaan
subTitle: Azad fights against the systemic oppression of society. Soon, he finds himself in a web of deceit and crime as he teams up with a group of allies to take down a ruthless arms dealer.

title: Sangharsh Aur Vijay
subTitle: Badri is groomed by martial arts and spiritual guru Bhishma Narayan to protect the Badrinath temple in Takshashila, where Sri Maha Vishnu is the presiding deity.

title: Meri Taqat Mera Faisla
subTitle: Selvam follows in his father's footsteps and works for the welfare of the people in his village. However, he is challenged by the local corrupt MLA, Rajalingam, and has to defeat him.

title: Drishyam
subTitle: When his family stares down the barrel of criminal charges, a commoner channels his street smarts and knowledge of movies to tie the long arm of the law into an investigative Gordian knot.

title: Drishyam 2
subTitle: Seven years after the case related to Vijay and his family was closed, a series of unexpected events brings a truth to light that threatens to change everything for the Salgaonkars.

title: Aavesham
subTitle: Three teens come to Bangalore for their engineering education and get involved in a fight. They find a local gangster to help them.

title: Aavesham
subTitle: Three teens come to Bangalore for their engineering education and get involved in a fight. They find a local gangster to help them.

title: Veeram
subTitle: A tough man, who uses violence to settle disputes, decides to change his ways for the sake of his lover.

title: Shylock
subTitle: Prathapa, a producer, is indebted to Boss, a ruthless moneylender, but refuses to pay his dues. As a result, the latter decides to make his life miserable at every turn.

title: Kotee
subTitle: Kotee is the sole breadwinner of his family living in Janatha City. Kotee lands in trouble and is forced to take loan from Dinoo Saavkaar, a local thug. He faces a life-altering choice, to be eliminated or commit one of Saavkaar's dirty jobs.

title: King of Kotha
subTitle: A man falls in love with a woman from a wealthy background as he finds himself struggling between his inherited legacy of crime and a desire for a life different from his father's.

title: Mufti
subTitle: An undercover cop tries to infiltrate an infamous don's criminal empire.

title: Dus Ka Dum
subTitle: Das, a local criminal, hires Vikram, a driving instructor, to take a young woman, Shakeela, to a village landlord in Mussoorie. Vikram falls in love with Shakeela, even though he is initially irritated by her antics.

title: Salaar Part 1: Ceasefire
subTitle: A gang leader makes a promise to a dying friend by taking on other criminal gangs.

title: Dashing Jigarwala 2
subTitle: When the students of the Travancore Maharaja College start to form gangs and engage in crime and brutal fights, English professor Edward Livingston decides to restore order in the campus.

title: Dashing Jigarwala 2
subTitle: When the students of the Travancore Maharaja College start to form gangs and engage in crime and brutal fights, English professor Edward Livingston decides to restore order in the campus.

title: Darling 2
subTitle: The lives of five friends turn bizarre when they go on a holiday trip to Valparai and feel the presence of a dead friend who recently committed suicide.
